response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with a strong craftsmanship background, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. Modern C++ experience is minimal and dated (a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments around 2000 and a thesis project), with no evidence of STL-heavy application architecture, MQTT/IoT protocol work, or IEC 62443 / SDL secure-development practice. Their recent career centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang web platforms rather than industrial automation, and their ~30 years of experience also falls well outside the 8–12 year target profile.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, caching, fibers) at Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source authorship
Event-driven platform design and multi-domain breadth (web, mobile, desktop, embedded)
concerns: Almost no recent or substantial C++/STL development experience
No industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), SDL, MQTT, or automation-protocol background
Experience level and career focus (full-stack/web) misaligned with the 8–12 year C++ industrial role

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation or IEC 62443 security background
Strong concurrent/low-latency systems and engineering-practice foundation
